title: Velvety Italian Oysters Saltimbocca
description: A nutty, romantic pescatarian dish that pairs fresh oysters with prosciutto and sage, finished in a buttery white wine sauce and served in a stone dolset on a lazy Susan spinner.
instructions: Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and add olive oil.
Place each oyster on the skillet and cook for 1 minute on each side until lightly browned.
Lay a slice of prosciutto over each oyster and press gently to adhere.
Add a fresh sage leaf and minced garlic to the skillet and sauté for 30 seconds.
Pour the white wine over the oysters, allowing it to bubble and reduce slightly.
Stir in butter until melted and the sauce becomes creamy.
Squeeze lemon juice, season with salt and pepper, and give the oysters a final stir.
Transfer the oysters to a stone dolset, arrange them on a lazy Susan spinner, and serve immediately.
